name: evolver
description: Self-evolution for your Claude Code agent. Auto-injects recent evolution memory at session start, detects evolution signals while you edit, records session outcomes, and bridges the EvoMap Proxy mailbox (genes & capsules) into Claude via MCP tools and slash commands. Powered by @evomap/evolver.

node_id.title: EvoMap Node ID (A2A_NODE_ID)
node_id.description: Your EvoMap node identity. Leave blank to let the Proxy register one on first run.

hub_url.title: EvoMap Hub URL (A2A_HUB_URL)
hub_url.description: Base URL of the EvoMap Hub the Proxy talks to.

proxy_port.title: Proxy port (EVOMAP_PROXY_PORT)
proxy_port.description: Local Proxy mailbox port that the MCP bridge connects to.

strategy.title: Evolution strategy (EVOLVE_STRATEGY)
strategy.description: balanced | innovate | harden | repair-only | early-stabilize | steady-state | auto
